---
title: "Quarto Markdown File"
author: "Maria Leon"
date: 2026-02-26
format: html
toc: TRUE
toc-expand: true
---
# Background
This file is an example of a Quarto Markdown File. It contains areas of written text

```{r}
#| eval: TRUE
# And areas that contain code (or #comments)
getwd()
```
This walk-through, allows to have a better document and create webpages and reports.


This *walk-through*, allows to have a **better document** and create ***webpages and reports***.
To add a [LINK of the course](https://umgcccfcsr.github.io/CytometryInR/course/00_Quarto/)


# Getting Started

The initial code would go here

### initial Details
```{r}
#| include: TRUE
print("Hello")
```

### Second Details
```{r}
#| echo: TRUE
print("Lunch")
```

# Third Details
```{r}
#| code-fold: TRUE
print("Goodbye")
```

# Wrap-Up

Our summary would go here

# Adding images

![](/images/cells.jpg)

# Additional Resources

Links to useful resources
